description: QQ Bot Plugin for OpenCode - integrates QQ messaging with AI assistant

modules.name: plugin
modules.purpose: Main plugin that integrates QQ messaging with OpenCode. Handles C2C, group, and channel messages. Provides status and restart hooks.

key_files.purpose: Plugin entry point - exports default plugin, QQBotPlugin

modules.name: gateway
modules.purpose: QQ Bot WebSocket connection manager. Handles authentication, intents, message events, session management, streaming responses, reconnection

key_files.purpose: QQBotGateway class - WebSocket connection, message handling, session management, streaming

modules.name: api
modules.purpose: HTTP API functions for QQ Bot: token, gateway, messages, media upload

modules.name: outbound
modules.purpose: Processes outgoing messages with <qqimg> tag support, rate limiting, image processing

key_files.purpose: sendText function - handles text and image messages with rate limiting

modules.name: config
modules.purpose: Loads and validates plugin configuration from environment variables

modules.name: types
modules.purpose: Type definitions for plugin configuration, messages, gateway options

key_concepts.description: QQ Bot uses WebSocket to connect to QQ's API gateway for real-time event receiving
Each user/group/channel can have an associated OpenCode session for conversation continuity
AI responses streamed to QQ with chunked sending and abort capability
Maximum 4 replies per hour per recipient to prevent spam
Supports image upload via QQ Bot API for inline images in responses
QQ Bot uses intents to subscribe to specific event types (guilds, members, group messages, C2C messages)
Supports pairing, allowlist, open, disabled policies for DM and group messages
